column7: Increases panicle weight; recommended to use SPAD meter for precision N management.
Promotes uniform stand establishment; phosphorus component critical for early panicle differentiation.
Supports high yield with improved protein content; S ensures complete N metabolism.
Improves grain sink activity; K application at heading reduces unfilled grain percentage.
Improves grain fill completeness; brassinosteroid action at heading stage reduces empty spikelet percentage.
Humic and fulvic acids improve root elongation; nano-K improves assimilate movement to developing grains.
Rhizosphere activation improves micronutrient uptake; organic acids support iron reduction needed in flooded soils.
Azolla green manure increases available N by 20–30 kg/ha; supports high spikelet number potential of this variety.
Water-soluble K at heading improves grain set; foliar application maximizes the high spikelet number of this variety.
